plan_summary.primary_goal: Execute the Pioneer: Maximum Throughput First strategy to clear 35,800 occupants from Zone Zero within 6 hours of trigger, sustain decentralized Command & Control through the T+6 to T+18 logistical-vacuum window, and stage 30% of N95/water requirements at Bozeman / Idaho Falls by T+16.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests the Zone-Zero compliance margin against the 98% T+6 threshold; the Disaster Relief Fund surplus against bottom-up evacuation spend; the N95/water staging margin against the 30%-by-T+16 target; the C2 fuel-endurance margin against the 72-hour cache target; and the public-compliance margin against the 70% panic-floor threshold. Governor jurisdictional-authority transfer, FAA/DoD emergency airlift authorization, and National Guard T+3 mobilization are treated as unmodelled existential gates.

key_values.label: Zone-Zero evacuation compliance target
key_values.comment: 98% of registered vehicles must exit Zone Zero checkpoints by T+6; below this the entire Pioneer strategy fails and VEI-7 contingency activates per Decision-4.
key_values.source_text: 98% of registered vehicles exiting Zone Zero checkpoints by T+6 hours.

key_values.label: Disaster Relief Fund immediate ceiling
key_values.comment: $500M DRF immediately accessible under Stafford Act for T+0 to T+24 life-saving logistics; the entire Pioneer-strategy financial envelope before any congressional supplemental.
key_values.source_text: Authorizes up to $500 million in immediate, no-bid expenditure for life-saving logistics.

key_values.label: T+16 N95/water staging target share
key_values.comment: Mitigation for the T+6–T+18 logistical vacuum: 30% of required N95 and water staged at Bozeman/Idaho Falls by T+16 via 10 helicopter sorties.
key_values.source_text: Logistical ingress gap mitigation aim is staging 30% required N95/water supplies by T+16 hours.

key_values.label: C2 fuel-cache endurance target
key_values.comment: Each decentralized C2 node must hold 72 hours of JP-8/diesel cache by T+6; below this Issue 2 names a decision-latency spike and VEI-7 trigger risk.
key_values.source_text: Established 72-hour fuel reserves for three decentralized C2 nodes.

key_values.label: Public-compliance panic-floor threshold
key_values.comment: Below 70% public compliance the Risk-6 panic-and-bottleneck path opens with 8–10 hours of evacuation-route time lost on I-90/Bozeman staging.
key_values.source_text: If public panic causes compliance below 70%, then evacuation timeline loss is 8-10 hours.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved Zone-Zero vehicle-exit compliance share by T+6
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives whether the 98% Pioneer-strategy threshold clears; below it the VEI-7 contingency immediately activates and resources reroute away from VEI-6 response.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Project from contraflow throughput on US-191/US-20 × landslide-blockage rate × panic-compliance multiplier; sensitivity to Risk-1 secondary-incident probability.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved Disaster Relief Fund spend over the 24-hour window
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tests whether the $500M envelope absorbs contraflow enforcement + emergency airlift + N95 procurement + fuel caches + recovery contingencies; Risk-2 names $500K–$1.2M for airlift mitigation alone.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Bottom-up: heavy-wrecker contracts + 10 CH-47 sorties × per-hour cost + 100K N95 × unit cost + JP-8 caches + National Guard activation; sensitivity to Risk-2 emergency-mobilization overrun.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved N95/water staging share by T+16
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Below the 30% target Zone-One life support fails per Risk 2; the entire Hybrid Flow Model exists specifically to defend this metric against the Decision-1 zero-ingress constraint.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: 10 CH-47 sorties × payload × utilization × airfield offload rate; sensitivity to airborne-visibility grounding (visibility < 1.2 mi) and FAA/DoD authorization timing.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved C2 fuel-cache endurance at remote nodes
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Issue 2 names a 24-hour baseline (UPS only) without engineering diversion; below the 72-hour target the distributed UC fails and decision latency cascades into premature VEI-7 activation.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: JP-8/diesel volume at site / consumption rate at max load; sensitivity to ashfall-degraded generator efficiency and tanker-resupply availability.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved public compliance with Zone-One evacuation orders by T+12
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives whether the Risk-6 panic-bottleneck path opens; below 70% the I-90/Bozeman staging congestion delays Phase-2 staging by 8–10 hours.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Combine IPAWS reach + Decision-8 messaging-strategy effectiveness + historical Yellowstone-area emergency-evacuation rates; sensitivity to mobile-broadcast-trailer deployment timing.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Zone-Zero compliance margin against the 98% T+6 threshold
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin validates the Pioneer Maximum-Throughput-First thesis at the T+6 measurement point; negative margin triggers the VEI-7 contingency and resource reallocation cascade.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Disaster Relief Fund surplus over the 24-hour window
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive surplus preserves the $500M envelope for Phase-2 expansion and post-eruption stabilization; negative surplus forces a congressional supplemental request mid-event.

recommended_first_calculations.label: N95/water staging margin against the 30% T+16 target
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin closes the T+6 to T+18 logistical vacuum; negative margin triggers the Issue-1 secondary-casualty path (10–20% increase in respiratory/dehydration cases).

recommended_first_calculations.label: C2 fuel-endurance margin against the 72-hour cache target
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin keeps the decentralized UC operational through the post-grid-failure window; negative margin produces the Issue-2 decision-latency spike and 15–30% increase in premature VEI-7 activation probability.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Public-compliance margin against the 70% panic-floor threshold
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin keeps evacuation routes orderly; negative margin triggers Risk-6 panic bottlenecks at I-90/Bozeman with 8–10 hours of staging delay and Phase-2 cascade risk.

unmodelled_gates.label: MT/WY/ID Governors execute the dual-hat Jurisdictional Authority Transfer Protocol at T+0
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Risk 3 names this as the binary governance hinge: without signed dual-hat MOUs the federal-to-state authority transfer at egress checkpoints collapses into 4–12 hour operational paralysis and ashfall-hardening assets cannot deploy under State control.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Operational paralysis 4–12 hours; ashfall-hardening (Decision 3) delayed; 25–50% increase in regional grid-collapse likelihood; engineering assets cannot legally cross state boundaries to harden substations.

unmodelled_gates.label: FAA/DoD authorize the 10 heavy-lift sorties for T+8 to T+16 emergency ingress
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: The Hybrid Flow Model that bridges the T+6 to T+18 logistical vacuum depends on FAA/DoD waiving Ground Stop in sectors ZLC/ZSE under ash-ingestion risk; without authorization the 30% N95 staging cannot be achieved by any modelled lever.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Zero airlift achievable; Zone-One life support fails per Risk 2; respiratory/dehydration casualties escalate as the entire ingress vacuum spans 12 hours unmitigated.

unmodelled_gates.label: Wyoming/Montana National Guard engineering platoons mobilize heavy equipment by T+3
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: The 72-hour C2 fuel-cache build and the M88 breach-vehicle staging both depend on Ready-Reserve mobilization within 3 hours of trigger; the plan offers no alternative path if mobilization slips.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: C2 fuel-cache target (72 hours) missed; ashfall-hardening delayed; contraflow-breach assets unavailable for the 90-minute internal response time; Zone-Zero T+6 clearance becomes unreachable.
